/CAL TO AMEND TO A NON-STRIKE CHARGE/DAWT/X PURSUANT TO THE NEGOTIATED DIPOSITION, EIGHTEEN MONTHS HAVING PASSED SINCE SENTENCING ON SEPTEMBER 5, 2017, AND IN VIEW OF THE DEFENDANT'S ONGOING SUCCESSFUL COMPLIANCE WITH THE TERMS OF PROBATION, THE CHARGE IS AMENDED TO A NON-STRIKE CHARGE,/DEF:WITHDRAWS PLEA TO COUNT 1/AMEND:TO ADD COUNT 2 - 487(C) PC, A FELONY/DEF:WAIVES INSTRUCTION AND ARRAIGNMENT ON THE ADDED COUNT AND WAIVES ANY IRREGULARITIES/X:THE PREVIOUSLY ENTERED PLEA OF GUILTY, IS NOW TO COUNT 2, AS AMENDED, AND SENTENCED NUNC PRO TUNC,/REMA/

/X A VICTIM IMPACT STATEMENT IS READ IN COURT BY THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'SFICE VICTIM ADVOCATE/AJW/DNACOMP/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 136D/CTS 136/4019HAL/IND/DTC/WS/WEAP/WEAP2/SA1 FILEMON GALICIA/SA1 JESUS GALICIA/SA2 INTERSECTION OF MISSION ST, AND 24TH ST,, S,F, CA/RESTV/X THE COURT NOTES ADULTROBATION HAS DETERMINED RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,291, THE COURT RERVES JURISDICTION AS TO ANY OTHER RESTITUTION DETERMINATIONS,/ /VF4 300/PPSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA 40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/X UPON 18 MONTHSOF SUCCESSFUL PROBATION WITH NO NEW ARRESTS, DEFENDANT MAY PETITION TO WHDRAW PLEA TO FELONY PC 664,211 AND ENTER A NEW PLEA TO FELONY PC 487(C),

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:05-10-17/987,2/BAIL:125,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/SA1:FILEMON GALICIA & JESUS GALICIA/SAORD3/SA2:INTERSECTION OF 24TH AND MISSION ST, SF CA/X:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO STAY AWAY FROM THE ABOVE NAMED LOCATION,/SAORD/ /CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPT 20/TE:4 HOURS/DOP/
